segments.speaker: BIRDY
segments.text: Doing okay. It's real pretty up here.

segments.speaker: BISHOP
segments.text: You're gonna want to start bringing her down soon. While you've still got the light.

segments.speaker: BISHOP
segments.text: I'm on the ground, partner. I'll take your word for it.

segments.speaker: BIRDY
segments.text: Man. I didn't think it'd look like this.

segments.speaker: BIRDY
segments.text: Hey. Thanks for staying up with me. Sorry to keep you so late.

segments.speaker: DEZ
segments.text: You know what Marquez got. The new guy. Six months.

segments.speaker: DEZ
segments.text: More than you. Six months in and more than you.

segments.speaker: DEZ
segments.text: That's not. No. That's not good for him. That's them robbing you and you saying thank you.

segments.speaker: BIRDY
segments.text: He asked. I bet he asked.

segments.speaker: DEZ
segments.text: Klein's still up there. Light's on. Right now, before he leaves. I did the math last night, Birdy. What they pay you an hour, for this. It's a joke. It's an actual joke.

segments.speaker: DEZ
segments.text: It's not the point if it's enough.

segments.speaker: BIRDY
segments.text: I'll talk to him. Next week. When he's not running out the door.

segments.speaker: DEZ
segments.text: That's what you told me last month.

segments.speaker: DEZ
segments.text: You'd take less. Just to not make him look at you.

segments.speaker: MAYA
segments.text: Donna asked about you today. At the register. I told her you were gonna fix her gate. You said that.

segments.speaker: MAYA
segments.text: Remember when we drove up to Index? You climbed that thing in your church shoes.

segments.speaker: MAYA
segments.text: Hey. How are you. Really. Just one. The real one.

segments.speaker: BIRDY
segments.text: I'll be up in a minute.
